subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and whoso hath attained unto true recognition in these days of the All-Merciful is verily among the people of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی فاز بالعرفان فی ایام الرحمن انه من اهل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
